chunks.title: Id & Classes in HTML
chunks.text: In this video, I will tell you what are ID and Classes? The concept of ID and Classes is one of the most confused concepts. In fact, when I was learning HTML, I was very confused in my early days. ID means Unique Identifier. That is, if you give an ID to an element, then you will not give that ID to the other element.

chunks.title: Id & Classes in HTML
chunks.text: But class means that if you want to give a property to multiple elements, then you will give it multiple classes. For example, you can give a class named Red to a div and a form. In the same way, you can give a class named BGRed to an article tag and a header tag. Do like this video because we will now go to the computer screen and look at these things very closely.

chunks.title: Id & Classes in HTML
chunks.text: Let's roll the intro. Alright guys, so I'm back. And if you haven't accessed the Sigma Web Development course, then access the playlist. Click here to bookmark and click here to save. And the source code is also being uploaded on GitHub.

chunks.text: So this is John's Aadhar number, and this is my Aadhar number, okay? Our Aadhar numbers can never be the same. Or if we assume that our friend becomes my friend, Tanya and John's friend becomes Shruti, okay? So their Aadhar numbers will also be different, okay?

And if I said 54, 56, 56, 7, you will understand that I am talking about Shruti. And if I said 34, 56, 85, 68, 63, then you will understand that I am talking about Tanya.
